pi_items.source: /workspace/scripts/setup_openproject.sh which creates an "E-Commerce Platform" project with this identifier.
verifier.py uses this specific string to query and award points for the first epic.
verifier.py uses this specific string to query and award points for the second epic.
export_result.sh queries these precise child subjects and verifier.py verifies they are correctly parented by the respective epics.

privileged_info_summary: The environment operates on a synthetic OpenProject database containing an "E-Commerce Platform" project (identifier: "ecommerce-platform"). The goal is to create two Epics: "Search & Discovery Epic" and "Checkout & Payments Epic". Four specific work packages must be assigned as children. Three of these ("Implement product search...", "Implement product recommendation engine", and "Fix broken checkout...") are present in the initial synthetic seed data. However, the work package "Design new product page layout" does not exist in the initial seed database and will log a warning during setup, requiring the agent to either create it or accept a point penalty.
